mapper.select: SELECT o.access_token FROM oauth_token as o JOIN tokens as t USING (oauth_id) where t.access_token = #{jwtAccessToken};
SELECT p.repo_id, p.pr_id, p.user_id, p.temp_status FROM pr_temp as p JOIN oauth_token as o USING(user_id) WHERE o.access_token = #{accessToken} AND p.temp_status = 0;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pr_temp (repo_id, pr_id, pr_iid, user_id, temp_status) VALUES (#{repoId}, #{prId}, #{prIid}, #{userId}, #{tempStatus});
